originalTitle: Thoma Bravo hands Medallia to lenders in one of PE’s biggest losses
summary: Blackstone-led consortium to take over software company and inject $150mn to help cut its debt load
content: Blackstone-led consortium to take over software company and inject $150mn to help cut its debt load
chineseTitle: 托马·布拉沃 (Thoma Bravo) 将 Medallia 交给贷方，这是私募股权公司最大的损失之一
chineseSummary: Blackstone 牵头的财团将收购软件公司并注资 1.5 亿美元以帮助减轻其债务负担
chineseContent: Blackstone 牵头的财团将收购软件公司并注资 1.5 亿美元以帮助减轻其债务负担
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
